instructions.title: WhatsApp Analyzer — Usage Guide
instructions.what_is_text: Local detection system for analyzing patterns in WhatsApp conversations. Processes files entirely without sending them to external servers — everything runs on your machine.
instructions.prepare_chat_steps:
- Open WhatsApp and go to the chat you want to analyze
- More options (⋮) → Export chat → Without media
- Save the file (.txt) on your computer
instructions.select_categories_text:
- **Predefined categories:** Sexual Harassment, Cyberbullying, Threats, Drugs, Infidelity, etc.
- **Custom terms:** Type names or words in the "Type" tab
  - Separate with commas or line breaks: `juan, pedro, marla`
  - For exact phrase search, use quotes: `"good morning"`
- **CSV file:** For many terms, upload a CSV with `term,category` per line
instructions.adjust_sensitivity_text:
- **Low:** Fewer false positives, but may miss real cases
- **Medium:** Recommended balance
- **High:** Detects more cases, but may have more false positives
instructions.upload_analyze_text:
- Upload the .txt file you exported
- The app analyzes automatically and shows results
instructions.results_text:
- **DETECTED:** Message exceeded risk threshold
- **NOT DETECTED:** Below threshold
- **Detected words:** Which terms were found in each message
instructions.author_linkedin: Tool developed by Lic. Antonio L. Martínez — Digital Forensic Expert before the National Judiciary. Inquiries and expert appointments: {linkedin}
instructions.privacy_text: All files are processed locally in memory. No data is stored or transmitted to external servers.

errors.verify_file: Verify that the file is a valid WhatsApp export
